tasks.label: Start PostgreSQL Local
args: $pgCtl='C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\16\bin\pg_ctl.exe'; $dataDir='C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\16\data'; if (-not (Test-Path $pgCtl)) { Write-Host 'pg_ctl bulunamadi, PostgreSQL 16 kurulumu kontrol edin.'; exit 1 }; & $pgCtl status -D $dataDir *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'PostgreSQL zaten calisiyor.'; exit 0 }; & $pgCtl start -D $dataDir -w
